debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_3
inst✝² : AddCommGroup V
inst✝¹ : Module ℚ V
inst✝ : FiniteDimensional ℚ V
φ : V ≃ₗ[ℚ] V
⊢ ∀ᶠ (v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (RingOfIntegers ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
    Set.BijOn
      ⇑((fun v =>
            ContinuousLinearEquiv.toContinuousAddEquiv
              (@Aux.continuousBaseChange V inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletion ℚ v)
                (UniformSpace.Completion.commRing (WithVal (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation ℚ v)))
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.instAlgebraAdicCompletion (RingOfIntegers ℚ) ℚ v)
                (UniformSpace.Completion.uniformSpace
                    (WithVal (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation ℚ v))).toTopologicalSpace
                ⋯ φ))
          v)
      ↑((↑(@Aux.c_v_alg V inst✝² inst✝¹ v)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
            (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
                        v).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range
      ↑((↑(@Aux.c_v_alg V inst✝² inst✝¹ v)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
            (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
                        v).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range

failed_attempts:
classical
    let b := Module.Basis.ofVectorSpace ℚ V
    let M := LinearMap.toMatrix b b φ
    let M_inv := LinearMap.toMatrix b b φ.symm
    let S := {v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (𝓞 ℚ) |
      (∀ i j, v.valuation (M i j) ≤ 1) ∧ (∀ i j, v.valuation (M_inv i j) ≤ 1)}
    have hS : S ∈ Filter.cofinite := by
      apply Filter.mem_cofinite.2
      have h_fin : ∀ x : ℚ, {v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (𝓞 ℚ) | 1 < v.valuation x}.Finite := fun x ↦
        (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.finite_setOf_valuation_ne_one x).subset
        (fun v hv ↦ ne_of_gt hv)
      apply Set.Finite.union <;>
      apply Set.Finite.biUnion (Set.finite_range _) (fun i _ => Set.Finite.biUnion (Set.finite_range _) (fun j _ => h_fin _))
    filter_upwards [hS] with v hv
    simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hv
    rcases hv with ⟨hM, hM_inv⟩
    let O_v := (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ v)
    let T := Submodule.span O_v (Set.range (fun i ↦ b i ⊗ₜ[ℚ] (1 : v.adicCompletion ℚ)))
    have h_range : (((Aux.c_v_alg V v)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
          (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
              (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
                      v).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range = T := by
      rw [LinearMap.range_comp, LinearMap.range_lTensor]
      -- Simplify the range of the lTensor map
      have : (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
          (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ v).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).range =
          Submodule.span (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ v)
          (Set.range (fun i ↦ IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V i ⊗ₜ[ℤ] (1 : v.adicCompletion ℚ))) := by
        -- Use the fact that lTensor range is span of image of generators
        -- And IntegralLattice is spanned by its basis
        sorry
      rw [this, Submodule.map_span, ← Set.range_comp]
      congr; ext i
      -- Aux.c_v_alg maps basis to basis
      dsimp [Aux.c_v_alg, Aux.c_v_alg_alg]
      -- Use property of baseChangeEquiv'
      sorry
    rw [h_range, Set.BijOn, Set.mapsTo_iff, Set.surjOn_iff, Set.image_subset_iff, Set.image_subset_iff]
    constructor <;> [skip; constructor]
    all_goals
      intro _
      simp only [Set.mem_image, exists_imp]
      rintro x hx rfl
      refine Submodule.span_induction hx ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_
      · rintro _ ⟨i, rfl⟩
        simp only [Aux.continuousBaseChange, ContinuousLinearEquiv.baseChange_apply, LinearMap.toMatrix_apply]
        rw [TensorProduct.sum_tmul]
        refine Submodule.sum_mem _ (fun j _ ↦ ?_)
        rw [TensorProduct.smul_tmul']
        refine Submodule.smul_mem _ ?_ (Submodule.subset_span (Set.mem_range_self j))
        rw [IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.mem_adicCompletionIntegers]
        -- Use hM or hM_inv depending on the goal
        try exact hM j i
        try exact hM_inv j i
      · simp [T.zero_mem]
      · intro x y hx hy; simp [T.add_mem hx hy]
      · intro a x hx; simp [T.smul_mem a hx]
  exact hφ
